title: Measured Value
description: A numeric measurement with an explicit unit

unit.description: Unit of measurement. Must be an SI unit or SI-derived unit, optionally with an SI prefix (e.g. V, mV, A, mA, Ω, kΩ, F, nF, µF, H, nH, Hz, kHz, MHz, W, mW, °C, m, mm). Dimensionless ratios such as ppm and % are also accepted.
